content: Phase 1: Get Resend playbook & setup env
Phase 1: Create test_core.py covering Resend + PoW + halving + transfer
Phase 1: Run test_core.py and fix until ALL pass
Phase 2: Get design guidelines via design_agent
Phase 2: Build backend (auth, mining, wallet, network)
Phase 2: Build frontend (Landing, Login, Dashboard, Leaderboard, Explorer)
Phase 2: Web Worker SHA-256 miner + i18n toggle ID/EN
Phase 2: All user stories implemented and verified
